recommendations.title: Prom Night
recommendations.overview: At a high school senior prom, a masked killer stalks four teenagers who were responsible for the accidental death of a classmate six years prior.

recommendations.title: Fear Street: Prom Queen
recommendations.overview: Who will be voted queen at Shadyside High's 1988 prom? For underdog Lori, competition is cutthroat even before someone starts killing off the candidates.

recommendations.title: Urban Legends: Bloody Mary
recommendations.overview: On a prom-night dare, a trio of high school friends chant an incantation, unleashing an evil spirit from the past with deadly consequences.

recommendations.title: The Last Matinee
recommendations.overview: In 1993, spectators at the last screening of a horror film at a downtown cinema fall one by one into the hands of a sadistic and ruthless killer.

recommendations.title: Close to the Horizon
recommendations.overview: Jessica knows exactly what her life is supposed to look like and where it takes her. But then she meets Danny. He has a complicated past and could confuse all their plans. Jessica has to decide.

recommendations.title: Surveillance
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent tracks a serial killer with the help of three of his would-be victims - all of whom have wildly different stories to tell.

recommendations.title: Kill Theory
recommendations.overview: While celebrating a graduation at a secluded vacation home, a group of college students find themselves targeted by a sadistic killer who forces them to play a deadly game of killing one another in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Weapons
recommendations.overview: When all but one child from the same class mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

recommendations.title: Black Butler
recommendations.genres: Horror, Fantasy, Action, Adventure, Mystery, Crime, Drama
recommendations.overview: Set in the year 2020, following her supposed death, a young woman returns as the son of her noble family to precede the family's prestigious company, with a demon at her side to avenge her parent's murder.

recommendations.title: The Nightshifter
recommendations.overview: Stênio, the nightshifter of a morgue, has the ability to communicate with the cadavers that are brought to him every night.
